summary: Full E2E testing after major backend+frontend refactoring. Backend: server.py split into modular routers. Frontend: calculation, Excel export/import functions extracted into utility modules. Found and fixed Excel Export bug (undefined variable 'description'). All core functionality validated.

minor.issue: Returns 404 due to K8s ingress routing (expected - not prefixed with /api)

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Excel export bug FIXED: Line 1591 in ProjectEstimator.js used undefined 'description' instead of 'projectDescription'

success_rate.backend: 96% (26/27 passed - only /health fails due to K8s routing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring validated. Backend routers in /app/backend/routers/ working correctly. Frontend utility modules (estimatorCalcs.js, excelExport.js, excelImport.js) working. Excel Export bug fixed. All navigation, CRUD operations, and estimator calculations functional.

features_tested.login_flow: PASS - Login with admin@yash.com works correctly
features_tested.projects_list: PASS - Projects page loads, can navigate to estimator
features_tested.estimator_page: PASS - Opens with existing project, shows calculations
features_tested.collapsible_sections: PASS - Project Info, Timeline/Gantt, Overall Summary all collapsible
features_tested.excel_export: PASS - Export to Excel works (bug fixed)
features_tested.smart_import: PASS - Smart Import button present and functional
features_tested.resource_grid: PASS - Resource allocation grid displays with wave tabs

bug_fixed.issue: Excel export ReferenceError: description is not defined
bug_fixed.root_cause: Variable name typo - used 'description' instead of 'projectDescription'
